radar.title: U.S. opens tariff probe targeting Germany’s drug pricing policies
radar.summary: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said Germany's proposal to reduce spending on medicines was "a serious step backwards."

radar.title: Plans to end gazumping with binding agreements in house sales shake-up
radar.summary: Sales agreements will be legally binding sooner and making sellers provide more home information up front are part of the planned changes.

radar.title: Warning over 'fragile' public finances as borrowing rises
radar.summary: The UK borrowed £23.3bn in May, according to official figures, up almost a third on the same month last year.

radar.title: Russia threatens escalation after Ukraine hits Moscow with largest-ever drone attack
radar.summary: Russia has pledged to carry out frequent and "massive group strikes" against Ukraine shortly after Kyiv launched a barrage of drones on Moscow.
